concepts_used.title: 摘要写作规范
concepts_used.how_used: 论文以一封致美国国会的信作为摘要，直接陈述研究目标、主要子模型和结论，风格简洁有力。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To the United States Congress, We would like to share with you the results of our study on how to address the nation’s carbon footprint. ... In conclusion, we recommend that the US Congress seriously consider the suggestions that we have made.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出4条全局假设，如所有电厂CO2可用、大气CO2稳定、公民配合等，为模型简化提供依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: II. ASSUMPTIONS (there are additional assumptions specific to different parts of our model) 1. All CO produced by power plants is available for use. 2. Unless otherwise specified, the CO that is consumed is in Standard Temperature and Pressure. 3. The amount of atmospheric CO stays relatively stable... 4. All citizens, especially farmers and power plant owners, are compliant with the government’s requests for change.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 使用线性比例计算：每棵硬木树年吸收0.02177吨CO2，通过面积和数量线性外推总吸收量。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Each tree consumes an average of .02177 metric tons of CO per year, so: (3,085,500,000 trees)(.02177 metric tons) = 67,171,335 metric tons ... (7,073,706,472 trees)(.02177 metric tons) = 153,994,590 metric tons

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用饼图展示总排放中生物圈吸收比例和电厂排放与大气排放比例，直观说明数据分布。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Graph 1: Total Human Emission Consideration (pie chart showing 1995 mmt biospheric absorption vs 3989 mmt human emissions considered); Graph 2: Emission Divisions (pie chart showing 2540 mmt from power plants vs 1449 mmt atmospheric emissions)

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 在庭院植树部分，考虑到实际庭院可能已有树木或部分土地贫瘠，将每户可植树数从112.5棵减半为56棵，体现对假设的敏感性调整。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We also realized that most yards would already have a few trees planted and a portion of yard space may be infertile, so it is unrealistic to assume that all 112.5 trees can be planted. Therefore, we arbitrarily divided that number in half: 112.5 trees / 2 = 56.3 trees, which we rounded down to 56 trees to be planted per home.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分明确重述问题、定义变量（独立变量为方法，因变量为CO2吸收量），并列出术语表。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: I. INTRODUCTION Problem Restatement ... Variables: In the most basic terms, our variables can be simplified to one independent and one dependent variable. The independent variable: the method used to consume CO. The dependent variable: the amount of CO consumed (in million metric tons (mmt)).
